docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE - NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LINHAI XIAO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE MOVERS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,630.00 FILED BY XIAO, LINHAI AS TO DEFENDANT DEPENDABLE MOVERS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
